positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The composition is centered and symmetric, featuring silhouetted outlines of oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms and tangled root systems growing around a central, geometric totem. Deep indigos, electric teals, and vibrant lavender hues dominate the color palette, accented by sharp, glowing emerald highlights. Use negative space effectively to enhance the contrast between the solid black silhouettes and the luminous background glow. Highly detailed, vector art style, flat graphic design, perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. Clean edges, strong graphical impact.
negative: photorealism, blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, excess detail, messy, random elements, gradients, noise, blur
